age_adjustment.interpretation: AD-vs-CN survives age-adjustment: 0.868 -> 0.844 after removing the age-linear component (age alone only 0.602). The signal is disease, not merely brain-age.

classical_baseline.interpretation: NeuroJEPA (0.868) beats classical whole-brain atrophy nWBV (0.829) — the foundation model adds signal over a single volumetric number.

multiplicity_fdr.method: Benjamini-Hochberg across the contrast panel, q=0.05

harmonization: ComBat on cohort (OASIS-1 vs OASIS-2), label-blind, preserve age+sex.
